title: diasperus microphyllinus
intro: Diasperus microphyllinus, also known as the Dipteracanthus microphyllus or the small-leaved dipteracanthus, is a plant species belonging to the family Acanthaceae. It is traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Diasperus microphyllinus include its ability to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. Diasperus microphyllinus can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and its leaves can also be used to make a topical application or salve for skin conditions.
